message:
test(readme): cover Series.unique/duplicated + round (fd90.236 / br-ea7vd)

Extends readme_element_wise_operations_compiles_and_runs to cover 4
methods that previously had no integration coverage:

- Series.unique() — Vec<Scalar> in first-seen order. Built a 5-element
  Series with values [1, 2, 1, 3, 2] and asserted len==3.
- Series.duplicated() — Bool Series of same length as input.
- Series.round(decimals) — element-wise float rounding.
- DataFrame.round(decimals) — element-wise rounding across all numeric
  columns.

Verified: 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
